title: 1.1: Tests that cursor positioning maps correctly to scroll region coordinates when VT100 origin mode (DECOM) is enabled with scroll regions
1.2: Tests that content scrolls into the history buffer when a bottom margin is configured
1.3: Tests that the first line remains fixed when only a top margin is set
1.4: Tests that scrolling is constrained to the region between margins when both top and bottom margins are set
2.1: Places the test for VT100 origin mode margin behavior in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.2: Places the test for bottom margin scrolling behavior in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.3: Places the test for top margin scrolling behavior in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.4: Places the test for combined top and bottom margin behavior in kitty_tests/screen.py
3.1: All tests use Python unittest framework
3.2: All tests follow the test naming pattern test_<feature_description> with lowercase and underscores
3.3: All tests use self.ae() assertion method
4.1: Follows the pattern of using self.create_screen() helper method for screen initialization in margin tests
